examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi mở đầu kinh điển trong Part 1. Giám khảo không chỉ muốn biết bạn thích gì, mà còn muốn nghe về tần suất, lý do và cảm xúc của bạn. Hãy cố gắng phân loại sở thích của mình (ví dụ: indoor vs outdoor, active vs relaxing). Tránh chỉ trả lời 'Yes, I like...'. Thay vào đó, hãy dùng 'I'm passionate about...', 'I'm a keen...', hoặc 'I tend to spend my downtime on...'.

band7.text: Yes, I have several hobbies that I enjoy in my free time. I'm really into photography, and I often go out on weekends to capture some landscapes. Besides that, I’m quite a fan of cooking; I find it very therapeutic to try out new recipes for my family.
band7.note: Trả lời mạch lạc, có ví dụ cụ thể. Sử dụng tốt các từ vựng như 'really into', 'capture landscapes', 'therapeutic'.

band8.text: Certainly. I’d describe myself as a bit of an outdoor enthusiast. Whenever I have some downtime, I head to the mountains for some trekking. It’s an incredible way to disconnect from the digital world. In addition to that, I’m an avid reader of historical fiction. I find that it’s a brilliant way to broaden my horizons while relaxing at home.
band8.note: Vốn từ vựng phong phú và tự nhiên (downtime, trekking, disconnect, avid reader). Sử dụng các trạng từ linh hoạt.

band9.text: Absolutely. I cultivate a wide array of interests to maintain a healthy work-life balance. Primarily, I’m a dedicated practitioner of yoga, which I find indispensable for my mental well-being. Furthermore, I’ve recently delved into the world of pottery. There’s something profoundly satisfying about working with clay and creating functional art. These pursuits provide a much-needed creative outlet and allow me to decompress after a demanding week.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng cực kỳ học thuật và chính xác (cultivate, array of interests, indispensable, delved into, profoundly satisfying, decompress). Cách diễn đạt rất tinh tế.

v.example: It's important to cultivate an interest outside of work.

v.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống
v.example: Having a hobby is crucial for maintaining a healthy work-life balance.
She is a keen practitioner of mindfulness and meditation.
Books have become indispensable to my daily life.
Yoga is excellent for improving your mental well-being.

v.meaning: tìm hiểu sâu về cái gì đó
v.example: I've started to delve into the history of ancient Rome.

v.meaning: nghệ thuật mang tính ứng dụng
v.example: Pottery is a beautiful form of functional art.
I go running after work to decompress.

v.meaning: một tuần đầy áp lực/đòi hỏi cao
v.example: I really need this weekend to recover after such a demanding week.
We like to watch documentaries in our downtime.
As an avid reader, he has over a thousand books in his library.

v.meaning: người yêu thích hoạt động ngoài trời
v.example: The park is a paradise for any outdoor enthusiast.

v.meaning: ngắt kết nối (khỏi công việc/mạng xã hội)
v.example: Hiking is the perfect way to disconnect and enjoy nature.
He travels often to pursue his interest in landscape photography.
Gardening is widely known for its therapeutic effects.
I've always been passionate about animal welfare.

v.meaning: tìm thấy niềm vui lớn trong việc gì
v.example: I take great pleasure in watching my garden grow.

v.meaning: có được sự hài lòng to lớn từ
v.example: I get immense satisfaction from finishing a difficult task.
I've been hooked on this new TV series lately.
She has a natural flair for interior design.

v.meaning: thành thạo nghệ thuật của cái gì
v.example: It takes time to master the art of public speaking.
In my hobbies, I always strive for perfection.
Writing is often a very solitary hobby.

v.meaning: hoạt động mang tính xã hội
v.example: Dancing is a great social activity to meet new people.

v.meaning: thể thao mang tính cạnh tranh
v.example: I’ve never really enjoyed competitive sports much.
Chess provides an excellent intellectual challenge.
Music is a powerful tool for artistic expression.
He approaches every project with a spirit full of zest.
I’m always on the go with my various hobbies.
I usually play mobile games to kill time at the airport.
Reading non-fiction is a good way to broaden your knowledge.
Hobbies are a great way to sharpen your professional skills.
Listening to jazz is how I unwind in the evening.

v.meaning: tìm thấy sự an ủi trong
v.example: Many people find solace in nature during difficult times.
Painting helps take my mind off the stress of work.
It's easy to immerse oneself in the world of movies.

v.meaning: rất bận rộn với cái gì
v.example: I'm up to my ears in my new DIY project.

v.meaning: nắm bắt được cách làm cái gì đó
v.example: At first, it was hard, but I finally got the hang of knitting.
I go jogging every morning to keep in shape.
Collecting old furniture can take up a lot of room.

v.meaning: dành riêng thời gian (cho việc gì)
v.example: I try to set aside time for reading every night.

v.meaning: thử sức với cái gì đó
v.example: I want to try my hand at gardening this spring.

v.meaning: là người bẩm sinh đã giỏi cái gì
v.example: He proved to be a natural at playing the drums.
I often lose track of time when I'm drawing.
I stumbled upon a beautiful trail while hiking.
We need to get a move on if we want to finish before dark.
The hobby is both relaxing and challenging at once.
Come to think of it, I've had this hobby for ages.
After a long day, it's nice to just put your feet up and read.
Going out with friends is a great way to let your hair down.
